headline: Why The Narrative Around Danaher (DHR) Is Shifting With Bioprocess Recovery And Masimo Deal
summary: Danaher’s fair value estimate has been trimmed slightly from US$250.14 per share to US$247.83 per share, a small move that still matters if you are tracking entry points and valuation discipline. That shift sits against a backdrop of mixed analyst commentary, where some see improving bioprocess conditions and portfolio moves as supportive, while others focus on timing risks and the impact of recent target cuts. As you read on, you will see how these changing views fit together and what to...
